title: Psychological Interventions for Bipolar Disorder in China: A Systematic Review
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"q7a8i","text":"There is no systematic review focused on the availability, implementation, and effectiveness of psychological interventions for bipolar disorder specifically within the Chinese context.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Condition or domain being studied: Bipolar disorder

Rationale for the review: There is no systematic review focused on the availability, implementation, and effectiveness of psychological interventions for bipolar disorder specifically within the Chinese context.
creator: Yuzhe Yang
